body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Allocate space in the `OceananigansSimulation` object so that we can remap in-place using `interpolate!` instead of `interpolate`.

closes #1377

## To-do
- [x] allocate 2 Oceananigans Center, Center Fields
- [x] allocate 2 arrays of the same format as will be output by the ClimaCore Remapper object
- [x] replace `interpolate` by using these scratch spaces with `interpolate!`

## Future work
I didn't yet implement the in-place remapping for `map_interpolate` since it's only called by `combine_surfaces!` (via `get_field`), which allocates anyway. When we make `combine_surfaces!` update in-place, we should return to `map_interpolate`. This will involve allocating a scratch ClimaCore field on the boundary space (to remap onto), and maybe an Oceananigans field to store locations at each point (as Tuples?).
title: interpolate in place
